---
title: "test_muninn_naming_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_muninn_naming_empire.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.75
style_score: 3.96
intel_score: 4.26
overall_score: 5.00
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_muninn_run_instantiation. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `test_muninn_run_instantiation`
